newsTitle: New computer with 128gb of ram on sale!
Description: Is crazy how the tecnology is going on these days, a few year ago was imposible to think about a computer like we do now...
content:
The latest generation of high-performance computers has reached a new milestone with systems now offering up to 128GB of RAM in consumer-level machines. This shift marks a significant change in the computing landscape, where such specifications were once reserved exclusively for servers, scientific computing, and enterprise environments. Today, creators, developers, and designers can access unprecedented levels of performance directly from their personal workstations.

This increase in memory capacity enables smoother multitasking, allowing users to run virtual machines, heavy development environments, 3D rendering software, and large datasets simultaneously without performance degradation. AI development, in particular, benefits greatly from this evolution, as training models locally becomes more feasible without relying entirely on cloud infrastructure.

Beyond raw performance, manufacturers are also focusing on energy efficiency and thermal optimization, ensuring that these powerful systems remain practical for everyday use. As technology continues to evolve, the line between consumer and professional hardware continues to blur, opening new creative and technical possibilities for users worldwide.

commentsData.comment: That's crazy, I can't imagine the price of this beast
What a good information, thanks for sharing
It looks powerful but I think it's too expensive for most users

Description: Photoshop add new features to the lats update of 2026, adding Firefly AI to our designs, Photoshop is making our work easier or just trying to remove us from the design?
content:
The 2026 update of Photoshop introduces one of the most significant transformations in the software’s history, with deeper integration of Adobe Firefly AI across nearly every creative workflow. Designers can now generate complex compositions, backgrounds, textures, and even full scenes using natural language prompts, drastically reducing production time for both professionals and beginners.

Features such as intelligent object removal, automatic lighting correction, and style transfer between images have been significantly improved. These tools allow users to iterate faster and experiment with ideas that previously required hours of manual editing. However, this evolution has also sparked debate within the creative community about the role of human designers in an increasingly AI-driven workflow.

Many professionals argue that rather than replacing creativity, these tools act as accelerators, handling repetitive or technical tasks while freeing designers to focus on conceptual thinking and artistic direction. The balance between automation and creativity is becoming a central topic in modern digital design culture.

commentsData.comment: AI in Photoshop is a game changer for designers
Very useful tools, but I hope it doesn't replace creativity
Good update but still needs improvement in precision

Description: Every time we design something one of the most important parts of it, is the font that we choose, we are not just choosing a font, we are choosing what we want to transmit, what we want to be, so is an important thing
content:
Typography in 2026 continues to evolve as one of the most expressive and essential elements in visual communication. Designers are moving away from static typefaces and embracing variable fonts that allow dynamic adjustments in weight, width, and optical size within a single file. This flexibility gives brands a more responsive and adaptive identity across different platforms and screen sizes.

Minimalist sans-serif fonts remain dominant in tech and corporate branding due to their clarity and readability, especially in digital environments. At the same time, experimental typography is gaining traction in creative industries, with distorted shapes, kinetic typography, and custom lettering becoming more common in branding campaigns and editorial design.

The choice of typography is no longer just an aesthetic decision but a strategic one. Fonts now play a key role in emotional communication, shaping how users perceive trust, innovation, luxury, or creativity within a brand’s identity.

commentsData.comment: Typography is underrated, this explains it perfectly
I love variable fonts, they are so flexible
Good trends, but I still prefer classic fonts

newsTitle: New Android Smartphones with a tablet size
Description: Photoshop add new features to the lats update of 2026, adding Firefly AI to our designs, Photoshop is making our work easier or just trying to remove us from the design?
content:
The smartphone industry is undergoing a major transformation with the introduction of new Android devices that blur the line between phones and tablets. These hybrid devices feature significantly larger foldable or expandable displays, allowing users to enjoy immersive multimedia experiences while maintaining portability.

Manufacturers are focusing heavily on multitasking capabilities, enabling users to run multiple applications simultaneously in split-screen or floating window modes. This makes these devices particularly attractive for productivity-focused users who want to replace both their phone and tablet with a single device.

Advances in flexible screen technology, battery optimization, and lightweight materials have made it possible to design devices that are both powerful and practical. As a result, the concept of a smartphone is evolving rapidly, moving toward a more versatile and multifunctional personal computing device.

commentsData.comment: Foldable phones are the future for sure
I love the idea of replacing tablet and phone in one device
